creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
/etc/rc.conf

sshd_enable="YES"
rpcbind_enable="YES"
nfs_server_enable="YES"
nfs_client_enable="YES"
inetd_enable="NO"
sendmail_submit_enable="NO"
sendmail_outbound_enable="NO"
samba_enable="YES"
mountd_enable="YES"
fusefs_enable="YES"
pf_enable="YES"
firewall_enable="YES"
firewall_type="open"
firewall_quiet="YES"
firewall_logging="NO"
firewall_flags=""
background_fsck="NO"
bsnmpd_enable="YES"
fsck_y_enable="YES"
linux_enable="YES"
vboxnet_enable="YES"
dhcpd_enable="YES"
ntpd_enable="YES"
ipv6_activate_all_interfaces="YES"
dumpdev="/dev/mirror/gm1p2"
samba_server_enable="YES"
ntpdate_enable="YES"
microcode_update_enable="YES"
cloned_interfaces="epair0 epair1 epair2 bridge0"
route_fritz0="192.168.178.0/24 194.XXX.XXX.1 -fib 0"
route_fritz1="192.168.178.0/24 192.168.179.1 -fib 1"
route_fritz2="192.168.178.0/24 194.XXX.XXX.1 -fib 2"
route_vdsl="default 192.168.179.1 -fib 1"
route_vdsl6="-6 default fe80::XXXX:XXXX:XXXX:XXXX%em0 -fib 1"
jail_enable="YES"
jail_reverse_stop="YES"
bird_enable="YES"
ipsec_file="/etc/ipsec.conf"
nfsv4_server_enable="YES"
tpmd_enable="NO"
tcsd_enable="NO"
dhcpd6_enable="NO"
smartd_enable="NO"
rsyncd_enable="NO"
lighttpd_enable="NO"
nfs_server_managegids="NO"
keymap="de"
ipsec_enable="YES"
ifconfig_epair0a="up"
ifconfig_epair0b="up"
ifconfig_epair1a="up"
ifconfig_epair1b="up"
ifconfig_epair2a="up"
ifconfig_epair2b="up"
ipv6_defaultrouter="2a0b:f840::1"
cloned_interfaces="gif0 epair0 epair1 epair2 bridge0"
ipv6_gateway_enable="YES"
vlans_em0="vlan2 vlan3 vlan4 vlan5 vlan7"
create_args_vlan2="vlan 2 -rxcsum -txcsum"
create_args_vlan3="vlan 3 -rxcsum -txcsum"
create_args_vlan4="vlan 4 -rxcsum -txcsum"
create_args_vlan5="vlan 5 -rxcsum -txcsum"
create_args_vlan6="vlan 6 -rxcsum -txcsum"
create_args_vlan7="vlan 7 -rxcsum -txcsum"
create_args_vlan8="vlan 8 -rxcsum -txcsum"
kld_list="netgraph tcpmd5 ng_ether ng_pppoe ng_socket ng_mppc ng_ppp ng_tee ng_tcpmss"
ifconfig_vlan3="inet 192.168.138.15/24 fib 3"
ifconfig_gif0="tunnel 192.168.138.15 216.66.80.30 fib 3"
route_adsl="default 192.168.138.1 -fib 3"
ifconfig_vlan4="inet 192.168.178.15/24 fib 4"
route_vdsl="default 192.168.178.1 -fib 4"
route_vdsl6="-6 default fe80::5e49:79ff:fe81:3e36%vlan4 -fib 4"
ifconfig_vlan5="inet 192.168.188.15/24 fib 5"
route_ftth="default 192.168.188.1 -fib 5"
route_sdsl="-net 192.168.1.0/24 194.XXX.XXX.1"
defaultrouter="185.XXX.XXX.X"
ifconfig_em0="inet 185.XXX.XXX.XXX/24 -tso4 -tso6 -lro -vlanhwtso"
ifconfig_em0_ipv6="inet6 XXX:XXX::15/64"
ifconfig_em0_aliases="
inet6 2a03:7500:cc13:1::15/64
inet 194.XXX.XXX.15/24
inet 192.168.2.15/24
"
ntpdate_hosts="192.168.178.1 194.XXX.XXX.2"
dhcpd_ifaces="em0 vlan3 vlan4"
ifconfig_em1="up -tso4 -tso6 -lro -vlanhwtso -rxcsum -txcsum -vlanmtu -vlanhwtag -vlanhwcsum -vlanhwfilter"
vlans_em1="vlan14"
rpc_hosts4="-h 185.XXX.XXX.15 -h 194.XXX.XXX.15 -h 192.168.2.15 -h 192.168.138.15 -h 192.168.178.15 -h 192.168.188.15"
rpc_hosts6="-h XXXX:XXXX::15"
hostname="t5.XXX.XXX"
ifconfig_vlan5_ipv6="inet6 accept_rtadv"
rtsold_enable="YES"
rtsold_flags="vlan5"
rtsold_fib="5"
static_routes="sdsl adsl vdsl vdsl6 ftth ftth6"
dbus_enable="NO"
avahi_daemon_enable="NO"
avahi_dnsconfd_enable="NO"
minirsyslogd_enable="YES"
syslogd_flags="-ss"
ntpd_sync_on_start="YES"
cloned_interfaces=""
create_args_vlan14="vlan 4 -rxcsum -txcsum fib 4"
route_ftth6="-6 default fe80::XXXX:XXXX:XXXX:XXXX%vlan5 -fib 5"
uuidd_enable="NO"
ifconfig_vlan4_ipv6="inet6 accept_rtadv"
rtsold4_enable="YES"
rtsold4_flags="-p /var/run/rtsold4.pid vlan4"
rtsold4_fib="4"
rtsold5_enable="YES"
rtsold5_flags="-p /var/run/rtsold5.pid vlan5"
rtsold5_fib="5"
jail_enable="NO"
rpcbind_flags="${rpc_hosts4} ${rpc_hosts6}"
rpc_statd_flags="${rpc_hosts4} ${rpc_hosts6}"
mountd_flags="-r -S -n ${rpc_hosts4} ${rpc_hosts6}"
nfs_server_flags="-u -t ${rpc_hosts4} ${rpc_hosts6}"
